title: NoElytra
description: This Minecraft Java Edition mod, NoElytra, disables the use of fireworks while wearing an elytra. As a Forge mod, it allows you to glide but prevents you from using fireworks to speed up, changing the game's flight mechanics. It's a free download that's ea
body:
# No Elytra Forge

This mod disables the usage of fireworks for elytras.

This means **you can glide, but can't use fireworks** to speed up your gliding.

# Server Installation
1. Download the mod
1. Go to the `mods` folder
1. Upload the mod jar file to the `mods` folder.
1. You're done!
